name: AI Systems Engineer / AI Platform Architect
description: Designs and builds production ML/AI infrastructure: model serving, training pipelines, vector stores, embedding services, and LLM orchestration layers.
signals_positive: ML infrastructure, model serving, training pipeline, vector database, LLM orchestration, embedding service, MLOps, GPU cluster
signals_negative: frontend only, marketing automation, junior data analyst, manual QA

name: Developer Relations / Technical Evangelist
description: External-facing technical role bridging engineering and developer community. Produces technical content, speaks at conferences, and drives API/SDK adoption.
signals_positive: developer relations, developer advocacy, technical writing, conference speaking, SDK adoption, API evangelism, community building
signals_negative: sales quota, cold calling, non-technical marketing, pure product management

name: Principal Data Platform Engineer
description: Owns data infrastructure at scale: data pipelines, warehousing, streaming, and analytical platform services.
signals_positive: data platform, data pipeline, streaming, data warehouse, Spark, Kafka, Flink, dbt, analytical infrastructure
signals_negative: BI analyst, dashboard builder, Excel reporting, entry-level data

name: Staff Platform Architect
description: Cross-team technical leadership for platform and infrastructure. Drives architectural decisions, defines system boundaries, and mentors engineering teams.
signals_positive: platform architecture, system design, cross-team influence, technical strategy, API design, distributed systems, mentorship
signals_negative: individual contributor only, no architecture scope, ticket taker, single-team
